data.title: EZGO Technologies Sets Up $100 Million At-The-Market Equity Offering Program
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

EZGO Technologies ( (EZGO) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, EZGO Technologies Ltd. entered into a Sales Agreement with AC Sunshine Securities LLC that allows the company, at its discretion, to conduct at-the-market offerings of up to $100 million in ordinary shares under an effective Form F-3 shelf registration. The company is not obligated to sell any shares, will pay a 3.0% placement fee on any sales, and plans to use potential net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including expanding sales channels, purchasing new production lines and investing in R&D, signaling a capital-raising framework that could support future growth without committing to immediate dilution.

The Sales Agent may execute transactions directly on the Nasdaq Capital Market or other trading venues, with customary termination rights, indemnification provisions and conditions attached to the agreement. A supporting legal opinion from Maples and Calder confirmed the validity of the company’s British Virgin Islands structure and the contemplated issuance, underscoring EZGO’s readiness from a legal and regulatory standpoint to tap equity markets as operational needs arise.

The most recent analyst rating on (EZGO) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EZGO Technologies stock, see the EZGO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EZGO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EZGO is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance: persistent losses, low margins, and ongoing cash burn despite modest revenue growth and manageable leverage. Technicals add further pressure given a clear downtrend and negative momentum, while valuation provides limited support because earnings are negative and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on EZGO stock, click here.

More about EZGO Technologies

EZGO Technologies Ltd. is a China-based company headquartered in Changzhou, Jiangsu, and listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The firm operates as a foreign private issuer and focuses on technology-related products and services, positioning itself to tap global capital markets to support expansion of its sales channels, manufacturing capacity and research and development activities.

data.title: Uranium Energy Begins Production at Burke Hollow Uranium Mine
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Uranium Energy ( (UEC) ).

On April 8, 2026, Uranium Energy Corp announced it had received approval from the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality and begun production at its Burke Hollow project in South Texas, described as the world’s newest in-situ recovery uranium mine. The site is also the first new U.S. ISR uranium operation in more than a decade and will feed output to UEC’s Hobson Central Processing Plant, which is licensed for up to 4 million pounds of uranium per year.

The startup of Burke Hollow, the largest ISR uranium discovery in the U.S. in the past decade, marks a key scale-up of UEC’s domestic production base and gives the company two operating ISR hub-and-spoke platforms alongside Christensen Ranch in Wyoming. With only about half of Burke Hollow’s 20,000-acre property explored and additional wellfields planned, the move strengthens UEC’s role in the U.S. nuclear fuel supply chain and aligns with federal and Texas support for expanding domestic uranium production and energy security.

The most recent analyst rating on (UEC) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Uranium Energy stock, see the UEC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UEC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UEC is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects a strong strategic/operational outlook and liquidity position from the latest earnings call, partially offset by weak TTM profitability and cash burn. Technical signals remain cautious and valuation is constrained by ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on UEC stock, click here.

More about Uranium Energy

Uranium Energy Corp is a U.S.-based uranium producer focused on in-situ recovery (ISR) mining, controlling the largest uranium resource base and licensed production capacity in the country. The company operates hub-and-spoke ISR platforms in Wyoming and South Texas and holds extensive exploration and development assets in Canada’s Athabasca Basin, while pursuing U.S. refining and conversion capabilities to support the domestic nuclear fuel supply chain.

UEC follows a 100% unhedged uranium strategy, seeking full exposure to uranium market pricing and demand fundamentals. Its management team brings decades of experience across uranium exploration, development, production and fuel cycle infrastructure, positioning the company as a key player in North America’s nuclear fuel ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 10,691,485

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $6.43B

data.title: Eureka Acquisition Faces Nasdaq Deficiency Notice on Holders
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Eureka Acquisition Corp Class A ( (EURK) ) is now available.

On April 6, 2026, Eureka Acquisition Corp disclosed that it had received a deficiency notice from Nasdaq, stating the company no longer met the exchange’s requirement to maintain at least 300 public holders of its securities for continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The notification does not immediately affect the trading or listing status of Eureka’s securities, but the company now faces a defined timeline to address the shortfall, with potential extensions or an appeal process that could influence its ongoing access to public capital markets and overall attractiveness to investors.

Nasdaq has given Eureka until May 21, 2026, to regain compliance with the Minimum Public Holders Rule or to submit an acceptable remediation plan, with the possibility of up to 180 days from the notice date to demonstrate compliance if the plan is approved. If Nasdaq ultimately rejects the plan, Eureka would be able to appeal to a hearings panel, a process that could prolong listing uncertainty and may weigh on stakeholder confidence while the company works to resolve the issue.

More about Eureka Acquisition Corp Class A

Eureka Acquisition Corp is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) whose business model centers on raising capital through a public listing and later merging with or acquiring an operating business. As a blank-check company, it does not have active operations or products but focuses on identifying and completing a business combination to deliver value to its public shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 6,057

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $54.53M

data.title: Air Lease Taken Private Following Completion of Merger
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Air Lease ( (AL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 8, 2026, Air Lease Corporation completed a merger in which each share of its Class A common stock was converted into the right to receive $65 in cash, valuing the equity at about $7.4 billion and the overall transaction, including assumed or refinanced debt, at roughly $28.2 billion. The company’s preferred stock remained outstanding with unchanged rights, employee equity awards were cashed out or converted into cash-based awards subject to time vesting, and holders of common stock ceased to have any rights other than to receive the merger payment.

To finance the deal, the surviving entity assumed a $1 billion term loan and obtained access to a $3.5 billion revolving credit facility, while a March 24, 2026 senior notes offering raised $4 billion across maturities from 2028 to 2036 that was placed in escrow until closing. Following completion, the note proceeds were released, became obligations of the company, and were used to repay existing indebtedness and for general corporate purposes, reinforcing the group’s capital structure under its new ownership.

In connection with the merger closing on April 8, 2026, SMBC AC acquired Air Lease’s entire undelivered aircraft orderbook for consideration equal to pre-delivery payments plus a premium, becoming the sole holder of rights to those future deliveries. SMBC AC also entered into a servicing agreement to act as exclusive servicer for the group’s aircraft leased to non-U.S. airlines, handling marketing, trading, technical asset management and risk management, while aircraft leased to U.S. airlines continue to be serviced internally.

Also on April 8, 2026, the company notified the New York Stock Exchange that trading in its Class A common stock and certain medium-term notes would be suspended and withdrawn from listing, with plans to deregister the common stock and suspend related reporting obligations once regulatory delisting is effective. The move effectively takes Air Lease private, removing public equity investors from future participation in its earnings and growth trajectory under its new corporate structure.

At the effective time of the merger, the entire prior board was removed and senior executives including CEO John L. Plueger and CFO Gregory B. Willis departed, becoming entitled to contractual severance packages comprising cash, bonuses and equity vesting. Immediately afterward, a new leadership team was installed, with Sumitomo executive Noriyuki Hiruta appointed chief executive officer and president under a secondment arrangement, and long-time company executive Sabrina Lemmens elevated to chief financial officer under a new compensation and severance framework.

Corporate governance was reshaped as the company adopted restated articles of incorporation and bylaws to govern the surviving corporation post-merger, aligning its charter with the requirements of its new parent ownership. Separately, a stockholder class action filed in November 2025 challenging proxy disclosures was voluntarily dismissed in December 2025 after Air Lease made supplemental disclosures and agreed to pay $450,000 in plaintiff’s counsel fees, without admitting liability, closing a key legal challenge to the transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (AL) stock is a Hold with a $71.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Air Lease stock, see the AL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AL is a Neutral.

The score is driven by mixed fundamentals: strong reported profitability and steady operating cash generation are offset by structurally negative free cash flow, leverage risk, and 2025 reporting inconsistencies. Valuation is supportive with a low P/E, and the pending $65 cash-out merger/delisting is a significant positive event. Technicals are moderately positive with an uptrend and stable momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on AL stock, click here.

More about Air Lease

Air Lease Corporation operates in the aircraft leasing industry, providing commercial jet leasing and related asset management services to airlines worldwide. The company focuses on acquiring new aircraft from major manufacturers and placing them on long-term leases, with a portfolio diversified across U.S. and non-U.S. carriers and a sizable orderbook of undelivered aircraft that underpins its growth strategy.

Air Lease’s model relies heavily on access to global capital markets and bank financing to fund fleet expansion, using a mix of secured and unsecured debt, term loans, and revolving credit facilities. Its revenue and earnings are driven by lease rentals, aircraft trading gains, and the effective management of residual values and airline credit risk across economic cycles.

Average Trading Volume: 2,070,600

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.28B

For a thorough assessment of AL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Constellation Brands Reports Fiscal 2026 Results, Raises Dividend
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Constellation Brands ( (STZ) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 8, 2026, Constellation Brands reported its fiscal 2026 results and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.03 per share for Class A Common Stock and $0.93 per share for Class 1 Convertible Common Stock, payable May 14, 2026 to shareholders of record on April 29, 2026. For fiscal 2026, the company posted net sales of $9.1 billion, reported EPS of $9.61 and comparable EPS of $11.82, generated $2.7 billion in operating cash flow and $1.8 billion in free cash flow, returned more than $1.6 billion to shareholders mainly via $924 million in buybacks, and saw its Beer Business remain the top dollar share gainer in U.S. tracked channels despite modest shipment and depletion declines and margin pressure from lower volumes and higher aluminum costs.

In the fourth quarter ended February 28, 2026, Constellation’s beer segment delivered net sales growth of just over 1% and depletion growth of 0.6%, with strength in Pacifico and Victoria offsetting softer trends in Modelo Especial and Corona Extra, while the remaining Wine & Spirits portfolio outperformed the broader wine category and achieved more than 8% depletion growth. Management highlighted disciplined execution in a challenging environment, maintained investment‑grade leverage near 3x, modestly raised the dividend, and continued capacity investments in modular brewing, signaling an intent to support long‑term beer growth and sustain shareholder returns even as overall annual net sales and operating margins declined year over year.

The most recent analyst rating on (STZ) stock is a Hold with a $151.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Constellation Brands stock, see the STZ Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Stream Holdings ( (GSFI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Green Stream Holdings, Inc. completed a redomicile from Wyoming to California and adopted new bylaws that formalize its capital structure, shareholder rights, and governance framework under California law. The bylaws confirm a large authorized share base, concentrate 99% of shareholder voting power in the hands of Series B preferred holders, restrict conversion of certain preferred shares through a 9.99% ownership limit, and remove preemptive rights and cumulative voting unless specifically approved.

Also on March 19, 2026, the board passed resolutions affirming continuity of all shareholders and outstanding shares as the company transitioned jurisdictions, ensuring that investors retained identical rights, preferences, and ownership stakes post-redomicile. The resolutions authorize management to update corporate records and coordinate with market intermediaries, aiming to provide procedural clarity and regulatory compliance during the shift to California incorporation.

More about Green Stream Holdings

Green Stream Holdings, Inc. is a U.S. corporation whose capital structure comprises 1,000,000,000 shares of common stock and 12,000,000 shares of preferred stock divided into Series A, Series B, and Series C Convertible Preferred Stock. Under its California bylaws, Series B preferred shareholders control 99% of total voting power, while Series A and C series are convertible into common stock subject to a 9.99% beneficial ownership cap.

Its products and technologies underpin resilient food systems by improving crop yields and nutrient use efficiency for agricultural producers worldwide.

On April 8, 2026, Mosaic said it would idle and demobilize its Araxá Mining and Chemical Complex and related mining activities at the Patrocínio Complex in Brazil, cutting Mosaic Fertilizantes’ annual phosphate production by roughly 1 million tonnes and reducing the workforce at both locations. data.title: Gauzy Employees’ Insolvency Bid Rebuffed by Israeli Court as Company Seeks Financing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Gauzy Ltd. ( (GAUZ) ).

On March 23, 2026, 24 current and former employees of Gauzy, including 11 current staff representing roughly 2% of its global workforce and 9% of its Israeli employees, petitioned the Tel Aviv District Court to open insolvency and economic rehabilitation proceedings against the company under Israeli law. On March 26, 2026, after Gauzy and a key secured lender opposed the request, the court declined to commence proceedings at this stage, while the company continues efforts to secure bridge financing and explore strategic alternatives, leaving stakeholders facing ongoing uncertainty but no formal insolvency process in Israel as of the April 8, 2026 filing date.

The court noted that only a small minority of current employees joined the application, contrasted with the majority who did not participate, which weighed against granting the order. The stance of secured lender Mizrahi Tefahot Bank Ltd., which also opposed the petition, further underlined creditor support for giving Gauzy time to pursue funding and asset-sale options, temporarily easing immediate insolvency risk but highlighting the company’s fragile financial position and reliance on successful recapitalization efforts.

The most recent analyst rating on (GAUZ) stock is a Sell with a $0.83 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gauzy Ltd. stock, see the GAUZ Stock Forecast page.

The company focuses on integrating its proprietary technologies into OEM and Tier 1 supplier platforms, positioning itself as a niche player in high-performance, value-added materials.

FinWise ( (FINW) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 6, 2026, FinWise Bancorp executed a planned leadership transition in which long-serving CEO Kent Landvatter stepped down from the chief executive role but remained with the company and its bank subsidiary as Executive Chairman, with no change to his compensation. The move is designed to preserve strategic continuity, as Landvatter will stay active in long-term strategy, governance and investor relations, reinforcing stability for stakeholders.

Effective the same date, Jim Noone, who has held progressively senior roles at FinWise Bank since 2018 and became CEO of the bank in 2025, was appointed Chief Executive Officer of the holding company while continuing as President and CEO of the bank. The board highlighted Noone’s track record of strong operational execution and emphasized that the succession, announced publicly on April 8, 2026, does not signal any shift in FinWise’s strategic priorities, financial targets or operating model, underscoring an intent to maintain the company’s existing growth and risk-management trajectory.

The most recent analyst rating on (FINW) stock is a Hold with a $16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FinWise stock, see the FINW Stock Forecast page.
